name: ShellPort
postCreateCommand: sudo chown -R vscode:vscode /workspaces && npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code && rm -rf /home/vscode/.ssh /home/vscode/.gitconfig /home/vscode/.git-credentials /home/vscode/.netrc && git config --global credential.helper '' && git config --global user.name 'candidate' && git config --global user.email 'candidate@interview.local'
postStartCommand: echo '' && echo 'ShellPort Ready' && echo '' && echo "  Go:          $(go version 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $3}' || echo 'n/a')" && echo "  Python:      $(python3 --version 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $2}' || echo 'n/a')" && echo "  Java:        $(java --version 2>&1 | head -1 | awk '{print $2}' || echo 'n/a')" && echo "  Node.js:     $(node --version 2>/dev/null || echo 'n/a')" && echo "  npm:         $(npm --version 2>/dev/null || echo 'n/a')" && echo "  GitHub CLI:  $(gh --version 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $3}' || echo 'n/a')" && echo "  Claude Code: $(claude --version 2>/dev/null || echo 'n/a')" && echo "  doctl:       $(doctl version 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $3}' || echo 'n/a')" && echo "  Git:         $(git --version 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $3}' || echo 'n/a')" && echo "  Homebrew:    $(/home/linuxbrew/.linuxbrew/bin/brew --version 2>/dev/null | head -1 | awk '{print $2}' || echo 'n/a')" && echo '' && echo '  Save all work inside /workspaces.' && echo '  Everything outside /workspaces is destroyed on cleanup.' && echo ''
